creator: prj@rootwyrm.com
text:
No maintainer response in 2 months. Going to assume these files can safely be installed. Tested and confirmed patch attached. Requesting a maintainer timeout. This one should also probably be MFH'd to quarterly since it's a relatively minor fix and impacts a number of dependent ports.

http://poudriere.rootwyrm.com/data/FreeBSD:11:i386-default-production/2018-08-12_14h51m43s/logs/aarch64-none-elf-gcc-6.4.0_2.log
